subcodes.title: Words to some musicians, spoken on 1912-08-13
subcodes.first_line: Music is produced by vibrations of air which affect the tympanum of the ear. Although music or an ordinary pleasing voice is of the physical realm
subcodes.first_line_orig: نغمات عبارت از تموجات هوائیه است که از آن پرده های گوش متأثر میشود و نغمه و صوت ملیح
subcodes.subjects: @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @music and singing
